errors.rpcNotConfigured: RPC URL not configured, please set rpcUrl
errors.rpcOrPrivateKeyNotConfigured: RPC URL or private key not configured, please set rpcUrl and privateKey
errors.serverNeedPrivateKey: Server environment requires privateKey to create account, use viem account utilities or other means
errors.privateKeyNotConfigured: Private key not configured, server environment requires privateKey to sign and send transactions
errors.contractAddressRequired: Contract address not provided, provide address in options or set address in config
errors.readContractRevertReasons: Contract call returned empty data or reverted. Possible reasons: 1. Contract does not exist or is not deployed at this address; 2. Function reverted (e.g. no user info at this address); 3. RPC returned empty data. Contract: {contractAddress}, function: {functionName}, args: {args}, error: {error}
errors.privateKeyRequired: Private key not provided, provide privateKey in arguments or set privateKey in config
errors.getBlockGasLimitFailed: Failed to get block gas limit: {error}
errors.getAddressTransactionHistoryFailed: Failed to get address transaction history: {error}
errors.scanContractMethodTransactionsFailed: Failed to scan contract method transactions: {error}
errors.configNotFound: Web3 config not found for name "{name}"
errors.walletNotDetected: Wallet not detected, please install MetaMask or another Web3 wallet
errors.createPublicClientFromWalletFailed: Failed to create PublicClient from wallet: {error}
errors.createWalletClientFailed: Failed to create WalletClient from wallet: {error}
errors.noAccountAvailable: No account available, please connect wallet first
errors.cannotGetChainInfo: Cannot get chain info, please ensure wallet is connected
errors.getCodeRpcRequired: Provide rpcUrl or use Web3Client instance getCode method
errors.contractNameRequired: Contract config must include name field

warnings.wsNotConfigured: [Web3Client] WebSocket URL not configured, event listening will use HTTP polling (poor performance)
warnings.wsCreateFailed: [Web3Client] Failed to create WebSocket PublicClient, falling back to HTTP: {error}
warnings.getGasPriceFallback: Failed to get gas price, using default: {error}
warnings.blockReconnectMaxReached: [Web3Client] Block listen reconnect attempts reached max ({max}), stop auto reconnect
warnings.transactionReconnectMaxReached: [Web3Client] Transaction listen reconnect attempts reached max ({max}), stop auto reconnect
warnings.startContractEventListenFailed: [Web3Client] Failed to start contract event listen ({contractAddress}:{eventName}): {error}
warnings.contractEventReconnectMaxReached: [Web3Client] Contract event listen reconnect attempts reached max ({max}), stop auto reconnect: {key}
warnings.stopContractEventListenFailed: [Web3Client] Failed to stop contract event listen ({contractAddress}:{eventName}): {error}
